title: The Prevention of Malaria (Special Provisions) Ordinance, 1978
title_en: The Prevention of Malaria (Special Provisions) Ordinance, 1978
description: An Ordinance to make provision for the prevention of malaria and for matters connected therewith. WHEREAS it is expedient to make provision for the prevention of malaria and for matters connected therewith; NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamations of the 20th August, 1975, and the 8th November, 1975, and in exercise of all powers enabling him in that behalf, the President is pleased to make and promulgate...

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Ordinance may be called the Prevention of Malaria (Special Provisions) Ordinance, 1978 .

provisions.title: 2. Formulation of measures, etc.
3. Power to require and prohibit doing of certain things
4. Penalty
provisions.content: 4. Whoever contravenes an order under sub-section (1) or obstructs or resists any person acting under sub section (2) of section 3 shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to taka five hundred, or with both.

provisions.title: 5. Indemnity
provisions.content: 5. No suit, prosecution or other legal proceeding shall lie against any person for anything which is, in good faith, done or intended to be done under this Ordinance.
